title: Outlook Calendar Export
description: Schema for the JSON output produced by Export-OutlookCalendar.ps1. Contains calendar entries extracted from Outlook Desktop via COM automation, with sensitive information (body, attendees, organizer identity) excluded.

exportDate.description: UTC timestamp of when the export was generated.

rangeStart.description: Start date of the export range (inclusive).

rangeEnd.description: End date of the export range (inclusive).

itemCount.description: Total number of calendar entries in this export.

entries.description: List of calendar entries within the export date range.

entryId.description: Outlook unique identifier for the calendar entry. Use as the sync key to match entries across exports.

lastModified.description: UTC timestamp of the last modification to this entry. Use to detect updates since the previous export.

subject.description: Title of the calendar entry. Defaults to '(No Subject)' if empty.

start.description: Local start date-time of the entry (in the startTimeZone).

startTimeZone.description: Windows timezone ID for the start time (e.g., 'Eastern Standard Time', 'Pacific Standard Time'). Falls back to system local timezone if unavailable.

end.description: Local end date-time of the entry (in the endTimeZone).

endTimeZone.description: Windows timezone ID for the end time. May differ from startTimeZone for cross-timezone events.

location.description: Meeting location (room name, address, or meeting link). Null if not specified.

organizerDomain.description: Email domain of the meeting organizer (e.g., 'google.com'). Only the domain is stored for privacy — no names or full email addresses. Null if the domain could not be resolved.

busyStatus.description: Show-as status of the calendar entry.

responseStatus.description: Your response status for this meeting invitation.

isAllDay.description: True if this is an all-day event.

isRecurring.description: True if this entry is an occurrence of a recurring event.

recurrencePattern.description: Recurrence details for recurring events. Null for one-time events or if the pattern could not be read.

interval.description: Interval between occurrences (e.g., 2 means every 2 weeks for a Weekly type).

daysOfWeek.description: Days of the week the event occurs on (primarily for Weekly recurrences).

dayOfMonth.description: Day of the month for Monthly/Yearly recurrences. 0 if not applicable.

monthOfYear.description: Month number (1-12) for Yearly recurrences. 0 if not applicable.

instance.description: Week instance for MonthlyNth/YearlyNth patterns (1=first, 2=second, 3=third, 4=fourth, 5=last). 0 if not applicable.

patternEnd.description: Date the recurrence pattern ends. Null if the recurrence has no end date.

occurrences.description: Total number of occurrences if bounded. 0 if unbounded (no end date).
